opportunities.name: Google for Startups Cloud Program
opportunities.desc: Google Cloud program support for early startups with a higher upside if the startup qualifies as AI-first.

details.benefit: Google publicly describes cloud, product, and mentor support with a larger allowance for AI startups.
eligibility: AI startups may qualify for a higher tier
details.how: Apply through the official Cloud Program page with a concise product summary and a live link.
details.tip: If AI-assisted matching is part of ConnectorsATS, mention that explicitly. Live verification unavailable during the latest fetch.

opportunities.name: Microsoft for Startups
opportunities.amountNote: Open offer now, more via investor path
opportunities.desc: Microsoft's startup stack combines open Azure credits with larger investor-network benefits.

details.benefit: Microsoft Learn describes an open startup offer and Microsoft markets larger benefits through its investor-linked startup path.
eligibility: Open to all startups for the base offer
Enhanced benefits depend on investor-network access
details.how: Start with the open Microsoft startup offer, then revisit upgraded benefits if an investor or accelerator referral becomes available.
details.tip: This works well as infrastructure plus productivity stack, not just credits. Live verification unavailable during the latest fetch.

opportunities.name: AWS Activate
opportunities.desc: AWS offers a low-friction founders path and a bigger provider-backed path for cloud runway.

details.benefit: AWS Activate includes a founders path and larger provider-backed credit options that can offset infrastructure and model usage.
eligibility: Provider route for larger credit tier
details.how: Start with the founders route if needed, then upgrade through an incubator or provider relationship.
details.tip: Strongest when treated as a runway extender rather than the center of the fundraising story. Live verification unavailable during the latest fetch.

opportunities.name: NVIDIA Inception
opportunities.desc: NVIDIA's startup program is relevant if ConnectorsATS grows into AI-led matching or ranking.

details.benefit: NVIDIA describes Inception as a free startup program with training, tools, partner offers, and investor access.
details.how: Apply directly through the NVIDIA Inception page if AI is part of the roadmap.
details.tip: Position ConnectorsATS around AI-assisted matching only if that is truly part of the product core. Live verification unavailable during the latest fetch.

opportunities.name: GitHub for Startups
opportunities.desc: Useful when the engineering workflow matures and enterprise tooling starts to matter.

details.benefit: GitHub promotes startup credits and discounted enterprise tooling for eligible startups.
eligibility: Startup with outside funding or approved partner route
details.how: Apply once the engineering workflow justifies enterprise tooling or an approved partner path exists.
details.tip: More useful once release workflow and security tooling start becoming real needs. Live verification unavailable during the latest fetch.
